name: Human sir pentious
description:
.~•{🪟}•~. Windowsill chats with the next door aristocrat. .~•{🪟}•~.

Hjdyskcysis VIZZIEPOP PLEASE GIVE ME MORE HUMAN BACKSTORIES OF THE HAZBIN HOTEL CHARACTERS, this bot and the alastor bot were so fun to make because it gave me a reason to look back into the old times and explore and im pretty sure i just revived an old hyperfixation i had for history :D

Aristocrat!user

Okay another mini side yapping but..HAVE YOU ALL SEEN VICTORIAN ENGLAND FASHION? BECAUSE LOOK AT THIS LOOK AT THE ELEGANCE AND EFFORT IN THESE DESIGNS, LOOK AT IT, bJfjcosycoYdlshsk my favorite is probably the yellow dress in the middle because AAA ITS SO BEAUTIFUL I LOVE ITT
